name: Texas Trail Rides / Lone Star Ranch
primary_activities: Guided horseback trail rides, lessons, skeet shooting, ATV tours, ranch events
notes: Operates out of Lone Star Ranch near Austin; family-friendly group and private rides.

name: Southern Trails
primary_activities: Guided ranch trail rides, sunset rides, kids-focused "Little Dude" rides
notes: Highly rated trail rides about 15 minutes from downtown Austin on a 100+ acre ranch.

name: Maverick Horseback Riding
primary_activities: Ecology-focused trail rides, horsemanship lessons, BBQ rides, private ranch tours
notes: Operates ranch trail rides around Lockhart and other Central Texas sites; emphasizes land and waterway stewardship.

name: Willow Horseback Riding of Austin
primary_activities: Scenic guided trail rides, photography add-ons
notes: Downtown-based booking for guided rides in the Hill Country; focuses on small-group scenic experiences.

name: Tri-Star Farm (Austin location)
primary_activities: Hunter/jumper and general riding lessons, boarding, weekly trail rides, summer camps
notes: Long-running program with Austin and Coupland locations; offers lessons for all levels and organized trail rides.

name: Bee Cave Riding Center
primary_activities: Hunter/jumper, dressage and western lessons, kids and adult programs, camps
notes: Hill Country facility west of Austin providing English and Western instruction for all levels.

name: Manor Equestrian Center
primary_activities: Riding lessons, horse boarding, training, summer camps
notes: Family-oriented barn offering recreational riding programs and boarding just outside northeast Austin.

name: White Fences Equestrian Center
primary_activities: Dressage-focused training, hunter/jumper lessons, full-care boarding
notes: Boutique dressage and hunter/jumper facility offering lessons and training for committed recreational and show riders.

name: Lone Star Stables (Lone Star Equestrian Center)
notes: Westlake hunter/jumper program with year-round lessons and small-group instruction for all ages.

name: Monarch Stables Austin
notes: Large 56-acre facility about 13 miles from downtown Austin with training for child and adult riders.

name: Scissortail Hill Equestrian
primary_activities: Eventing and hunter/jumper lessons, schooling shows, camps
notes: South Austin riding academy with a focus on safe, confidence-building instruction and local shows.

name: Rio Vista Farm
primary_activities: Hunter/jumper lessons, boarding, camps, show program
notes: Leading English riding barn now based in Dripping Springs; accepts riders without owning a horse.

name: Lone Star Riding Club
primary_activities: English and Western lessons, kids horse camps, clinics and events
notes: United States Pony Club Riding Center with multiple Austin-area locations and a large school-horse string.

name: Switch Willo Stables
primary_activities: Hunter/jumper lessons, show program, state-certified kids riding camp
notes: Long-established hunter/jumper barn with extensive youth programs and camps near central/north Austin.

name: Coraggio Equestrian
primary_activities: Premium horse boarding, individualized training, access to shaded trails
notes: Peaceful Hill Country facility with 100+ acres of shaded trails and focus on personalized horse care.

name: Miraval Austin Resort & Spa (Equine Program)
primary_activities: Rhythmic riding, equine-assisted mindfulness and leadership, private trail rides for resort guests
notes: Upscale wellness resort with a dedicated equine center; riding is primarily for overnight and day guests.

name: Austin Carriage Rides and Tours (Austin Carriage)
primary_activities: Horse-drawn carriage rides, downtown tours, event transportation
notes: Downtown carriage company offering romantic and historic horse-drawn rides rather than trail riding.
